text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm gathering<n>reference materials
for races in the<n>school library...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait! I wanna read that magazine<n>too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure it's got an article<n>about that race
where Prez stayed in<n>the lead the whole time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Maaan, I wish I could run like Prez...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I don't get going until the<n>final corner...
But you can never have<n>too many tricks up your
sleeve, right?
choice_data_list: Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!
Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I don't get going until the<n>final corner...
But you can never have<n>too many tricks up your
sleeve, right?
choice_data_list: Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!
Yeah, people who can do it all are so cool!

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

I think you have plenty of weapons up your
sleeve already.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You think so too?! Ahaha, we're like<n>two peas in
a pod!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be tough going, but I'm<n>gonna do my
very best to become<n>just like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Tokai Teio runs off like<n>a kid hyped
up on candy. Looks like I<n>managed to kindle her
motivation.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?! Hehe! Well, it is mewe're talking about! ♪ I gotta say, youhave a good eye!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna polish up the<n>weapons I've
currently got!
